summary: Iteration 3 full test pass: 15/15 new backend pytests + 18/18 iter1+iter2 regression = 33/33 backend green. Full frontend E2E for Interviewer Console (Kits CRUD UI), NewInterview atelier picker & panel-config prefill, InterviewReport share-btn → SharedReport reviewer-note flow all working. Role gating verified: reviewer sees CONSOLE nav link + verdict panel; interviewee/unauth do NOT see reviewer-note-panel. Panel counsel rotation correct via both POST /message and SSE stream (meta.counsel_name + done.assistant.counsel_name).

test_results_detail.regression_models_ateliers_stats_me: PASS — /api/models, /api/ateliers (9 curated with all fields), /api/stats/summary, /api/auth/me all healthy after refactor.
test_results_detail.atelier_on_interview: PASS — POST /api/interviews with atelier_id='stripe' stores atelier_id on doc.
test_results_detail.panel_custom_config: PASS — Panel interview created with custom 3-counsel panel_config; first message counsel_name = panel[0].name.
test_results_detail.panel_default: PASS — Panel interview without panel_config auto-populates 3-counsel default (Priya/Ola/Ren).
test_results_detail.panel_rotation_messages: PASS — 2 user messages → replies from panel[1] then panel[2] as expected.
test_results_detail.panel_sse_stream: PASS — SSE delta frames include meta.counsel_name, done.assistant.counsel_name is set.
test_results_detail.kits_crud: PASS — create → list → get → put (persistence verified via re-fetch) → soft-delete → 404 on get.
test_results_detail.kits_isolation: PASS — demo user does not see reviewer's kits (per-owner scoping).
test_results_detail.interview_with_kit_id: PASS — POST /api/interviews with kit_id stores kit_id on doc.
test_results_detail.public_share_get: PASS — Unauthenticated GET /api/share/:token returns feedback + messages + score with system_prompt/user_id stripped.
test_results_detail.reviewer_note_flow: PASS — POST /api/share/:token/note as reviewer returns 200 with verdict/note; GET /api/reviews/inbox lists it.
test_results_detail.role_toggle: PASS — PATCH /api/auth/me/role self-serve promote to interviewer + revert to interviewee; invalid role 400.
test_results_detail.frontend_reviewer_navbar: PASS — CONSOLE link (nav-console-btn) visible; new-interview-btn text = 'Open the Console'.
test_results_detail.frontend_console: PASS — /console renders console-page + console-title 'The bench.' + tabs (kits/inbox/review). Kit editor create → refresh → persisted in kits-list.
test_results_detail.frontend_new_interview_ateliers_panel: PASS — atelier-none/stripe/airbnb testids present. Clicking type-panel reveals panel-config with 3 default counsels (Priya/Ola/Ren) at panelist-0/1/2 with panelist-name/role/style-0 fields + add-panelist button.
test_results_detail.frontend_report_share: PASS — share-btn click → POST /api/interviews/:id/share 200 → UI shows share-active + copy-share-btn + revoke-share-btn.
test_results_detail.frontend_shared_report_role_gate: PASS — /share/:token loads shared-report-page + shared-overall-score. reviewer-note-panel is hidden for interviewee (demo) AND for unauthenticated user; visible for reviewer with verdict-hire/borderline/pass + reviewer-note-input + submit-note-btn.
test_results_detail.frontend_submit_note: PASS — Reviewer selects hire verdict, fills note, submit-note-btn → POST /note 200 + 'Note filed' success toast.

critical_code_review_comments: InterviewerConsole.removeKit uses window.confirm — automated E2E tests must register a page.on('dialog') handler to accept it. Consider replacing with an in-app confirm modal (would give a data-testid=confirm-delete-btn and improve testability).

share.py add_interviewer_note has no role check — any authenticated user (even the candidate themselves) can POST a verdict to their own share token. Consider gating on user['role']=='interviewer' (see /api/kits which is intentionally per-owner but /api/reviews is meant for reviewers).
share.py revoke_share silently returns {ok:true} even when the interview_id doesn't belong to the user (update_one just no-ops). Consider raising 404 when matched_count==0 for defensive behaviour.
core.py InterviewCreateInput.panel_config accepts up to unbounded counsels; add a max_items=4 constraint to match the '2-4 rotating' contract, and min 2 to prevent single-counsel panels.
routes/interviews.py imports 15+ symbols from core — as core grows, consider splitting core into config.py + models.py + llm.py + storage.py for a cleaner import surface (echoes iter2 review).
seed_data_creation: Created ~6 TEST_ prefixed interviews (atelier, 2 panel, share, kit-based) + 2 TEST_ kits (one soft-deleted, one deleted by cleanup) + 1 reviewer note + 1 UI_TEST kit + 1 UI_TEST reviewer note. All under demo/reviewer accounts; no cleanup performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter3 features verified end-to-end. Backend refactor from server.py into core.py + routes/*.py is clean — no regressions. Panel counsel rotation uses `assistant_msg_count % panel_length` and correctly persists counsel_name/counsel_role on each assistant msg. Public share endpoint correctly strips system_prompt/user_id. Note: /api/share/:token/note is currently NOT role-gated on the backend — see code review comment #2. If iter4 adds an admin/moderator view, revisit this.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Only advisory code review comments.
